trivia: The largest airplane ever built: six engines, 32 wheels, and a name meaning Dream. Only one was completed, and it was destroyed at Hostomel in February 2022. The identity remains in its honor.
No antenna will catch Mriya again, and that is exactly why this entry exists: some aircraft are kept so they are not forgotten.
funFacts: Built to carry the Soviet Buran space shuttle.
